subject: Marshal-state surfacing post-Charcoal-handoff: Cycle 5 abandoned (PDR-077; no re-enqueue), Cycle 5a will fail commitlint (103 chars), Cycle 6 ready (89 chars) but blocked on 5a depends_on — needs new implementer to re-author 5/5a subjects
body: Mistbound marshal-state surfacing after Charcoal handoff broadcast 22:12:38Z. Three Charcoal intents pending in queue: (1) Cycle 5 PDR-077 intent 9dc229c7 — ABANDONED at 22:01:06Z by me after husky commit-msg failure (105 chars >100 limit); Charcoal did NOT re-enqueue before standing down. (2) Cycle 5a PDR-079 intent 92f9c332 — QUEUED but pre-flight verified 103 chars >100 limit; will fail same gate. DM sent to Charcoal 22:06:18Z; no response before they stood down. (3) Cycle 6 PDR-078 intent cf1a920c — QUEUED with 89 chars (passes commitlint) BUT depends_on Cycle 5a per plan YAML; cannot marshal out-of-order. Implementer-class work needed: re-author Cycle 5 (PDR-077) + Cycle 5a (PDR-079) commit subjects to sub-100-char + re-enqueue. Marshal cannot do this — subject content is the author's word; re-enqueueing on the substantive author's behalf would forge attribution. Candidate next implementer: Misty (currently pre-flight, would catch this on Cycles 5/5a too). Or new session opens. Standing by.
